title: glochidion hirtellum
intro: Glochidion hirtellum, also known as the hairy globe or hairy croton, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Glochidion hirtellum include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or taken as a supplement, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to promote digestion and relieve stress.
